scope: Independent audit of README zero-Python skill onboarding
rationale: README now has a prominent zero-Python path at the top before the detailed feature list, with copy/paste uv install, git-based uvx run, uv tool install, and Codex skills/abh-workflow prompts. Tests assert the beginner install and skill entry remain visible, and verification evidence shows the plan checklist passed, including the dedicated README contract test and full unittest/doctor/roadmap checks. No evidence shows runtime behavior changes, package publishing/PyPI claims, bare uvx abh claims, or multi-repo sharing implementation within this plan scope.
